content: bashio is a bash function library pre-installed in HA base images. bashio::config 'key' reads /data/options.json (user options). bashio::services 'mqtt' 'host'/'port'/'username'/'password'/'ssl' calls GET /services/mqtt. bashio::log.info/warning/error for logging. Raw access: jq --raw-output '.key' /data/options.json. 250+ functions for Supervisor API, filesystem, logging.
